MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Lauren Jones (415-926-7600) of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP for Plaintiff.
Cress Templeton (ctempleton@hfbllp.com) of Hill, Farrer & Burrill LLP for Defendant.

Defendant's Counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
